title: BDA Histology Protocol
author: Blake Butler
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.z4af8se

steps.title: Reconstitute the Vectastain ABC solution Prepare...
steps.instruction: Reconstitute the Vectastain ABC solution Prepare 80 mL solution: 79 mL 0.1 Molarity (M) Physiological Buffer 480 µL Solution A 480 µL Solution B Avidin/Biotin HRP Complex Vector Laboratories Catalog #PK-6100 Thaw 6 x 1mL vials of NGS for later use Normal Goat Serum Cedarlane Catalog #CL1200-500

steps.title: Rinse sections in 0
steps.instruction: Rinse sections in 0.1 M Physiological Buffer (4x5min) 00:05:00 00:05:00 00:05:00 00:05:00

steps.title: Block Endogenous Peroxidase 105 mL Methanol...
steps.instruction: Block Endogenous Peroxidase 105 mL Methanol 45 mL De-ionized Water 750 µL 30 % volume Hydrogen Peroxide 00:30:00

steps.title: Rinse sections in 0
steps.instruction: Rinse sections in 0.1 M Physiological Buffer (4x5min) 00:05:00 00:05:00 00:05:00 00:05:00

steps.title: Transfer tissue to individual reaction wells...
steps.instruction: Transfer tissue to individual reaction wells and incubate in Avidin/Biotin HRP Complex Prepared in Step 1 01:30:00

steps.title: Transfer tissue back to reaction trays...
steps.instruction: Transfer tissue back to reaction trays and rinse sections in 0.1 M Physiological Buffer (3x10min) 00:10:00 00:10:00 00:10:00

steps.title: Incubate in DAB-Nickel Chromogen Solution 150 mL 0
steps.instruction: Incubate in DAB-Nickel Chromogen Solution 150 mL 0.1 Molarity (M) Physiological Buffer .1125 g 3,3' Diaminobenzidine Tetrachloride (DAB) 1.875 mL 1 Mass / % volume Cobalt Chloride (Added dropwise) 3 mL 1 Mass / % volume Nickel Ammonium Sulfate (Added dropwise) 50 µL 30 % volume Hydrogen Peroxide (Added 60s before incubation) 3,3′-Diaminobenzidine tetrahydrochloride Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #D5905 00:20:00 (Approximate time - Actual endpoint determined visually)

steps.title: Rinse sections in 0
steps.instruction: Rinse sections in 0.1 M Physiological Buffer (3x5min) 00:05:00 00:05:00 00:05:00
